overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist in ancient Egyptian attire walking up a hieroglyph-covered stone causeway toward a massive cliff-carved temple, ascending the stairs, and exploring the torch-lit interior halls with elaborate wall reliefs.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone causeway with hieroglyphic inscriptions leading to temple

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the inclined stone causeway toward the temple entrance, passing palm trees and stone railings

notable_agents.action: civilian in grey dress and blue head covering walking ahead on the causeway

entered.detail: wide stone ramp covered with hieroglyphic inscriptions
tall palm tree in stone planter along the causeway edge
massive ancient Egyptian temple entrance carved into cliff face with colorful friezes
giant seated pharaoh statues flanking the temple entrance
rocky desert cliff face rising behind the temple structure
low stone wall bordering the left side of the causeway

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a sunlit stone causeway adorned with hieroglyphs, approaching a magnificent ancient Egyptian temple carved into a desert cliff. Palm trees line the path and colossal statues guard the entrance ahead, while a civilian walks ahead on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to temple entrance

events.description: character enters the dark temple doorway from the bright exterior

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase toward the temple entrance, moving from bright sunlight into shadow

entered.detail: broad stone steps leading up to the temple entrance
dark rectangular doorway framed by decorated columns
stone walls covered with colorful Egyptian reliefs and inscriptions
golden winged solar disk decoration above the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase toward the temple entrance, passing between walls covered in hieroglyphic reliefs. The lighting shifts from bright sun to shadow as the character approaches and enters the dark doorway, leaving the causeway behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow entrance corridor with hieroglyphic reliefs

events.description: lighting shifts from bright exterior to dim interior as character moves deeper into the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow entrance corridor, moving from light into the darker interior

notable_agents.action: temple worker in green skirt walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: tall stone walls with detailed hieroglyphic carvings
opening leading to a larger interior space with visible torchlight

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow corridor with walls covered in hieroglyphic reliefs, transitioning from the bright exterior into the dimly lit interior. A temple worker in a green skirt walks ahead, and torchlight becomes visible at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with burning braziers and potted palms

events.description: text overlay appears identifying location as Temple of Thoth Hermopolis

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall, passing between burning braziers and potted palms toward the inner chambers

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing in the hall near the central pathway

entered.detail: large bronze bowl with flames providing warm illumination
palm tree in large decorative planter
tall column with colorful Egyptian paintings and hieroglyphs
ornate doorway leading deeper into the temple complex

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall illuminated by burning braziers, with potted palm trees and decorated pillars lining the space. A robed figure stands near the path, and text appears identifying the location as the Temple of Thoth Hermopolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple corridor with hieroglyphic walls

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow inner corridors, passing wall reliefs and burning braziers

entered.detail: stone walls with detailed hieroglyphic inscriptions and figures
dark opening at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the temple through narrow corridors with walls covered in hieroglyphic reliefs, leaving the grand hall behind. The path is dimly lit by distant braziers as the character approaches another doorway at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open desert causeway into the shadowed depths of a cliff-carved Egyptian temple. It begins with the character walking up a sunlit stone path adorned with hieroglyphs and lined with palm trees, moving toward colossal statues that guard the temple entrance. As the character ascends the grand staircase, the lighting shifts from brilliant sunlight to deep shadow, passing between relief-covered walls before crossing the threshold of the dark doorway. The scene then transitions into a narrow interior corridor where the bright exterior fades, following a temple worker toward the flickering glow of torchlight at the far end of the passage.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a spacious, brightly lit ceremonial hall into the claustrophobic depths of a temple's inner corridors. It begins as the character enters the grand Temple of Thoth Hermopolis, moving past burning braziers, potted palm trees, and decorated pillars while passing a robed figure. As the character advances, the open architecture of the hall recedes, and the scene shifts into a series of narrow passageways. The environment becomes more enclosed, with the walls now densely covered in hieroglyphic reliefs and the lighting dimming to the glow of distant braziers. The camera continues forward through these tight spaces before finally approaching a solitary doorway at the corridor's end.
